name: Fettuccine with Butter, Garlic, Parmesan, & Black Pepper
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large (at least 4-quart) saucepan, bring well-salted water to a boil.
2. Drizzle in oil.
3. Stir in fettuccine and cook until firm-tender (about 2 minutes for fresh, 7 minutes for dried), tasting single strands frequently.
4. Do not allow pasta to become mushy.
5. Drain as soon as done and place in serving dish.
6. While pasta cooks, melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
7. Add garlic and cook until garlic is transparent but not browned.
8. Pour garlic butter over pasta.
9. Stir in cheese to taste 1 tablespoon at a time and season with salt and a liberal quantity of freshly ground black pepper (8 to 12 grinds).
